templates.name: Order status / tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://www.tadashishoji.com/sales/guest/form/?srsltid=AfmBOopiBNg4OgyX0ZkLPGnW03fEl2apddbiORn1OU0s-AN8yn8Sd75U

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.tadashishoji.com/outlet/clearance

templates.name: Does the Loyalty Elite Membership program include sale items?
templates.content: Yes, the Loyalty Elite Membership discount is sitewide and does include Outlet items. As a member, you will receive 30% off sitewide for a year with every member qualifying purchase. Your membership expires a year after your enrollment date. Please let us know if you have any additional questions.

templates.name: Can I order extra fabric?
templates.content: Yes, depending on the availability of the requested fabric. Fabric orders can take up to 5 business days to complete and are Final Sale. Please contact customer care for more information here: customercare@tadashishoji.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I have a price adjustment, add a code retroactively?
templates.content: Please email us at email at customercare@tadashishoji.com to see if we can accommodate your request.

templates.name: What is Bolt?
templates.content: Bolt is our credit card processor!

templates.name: Complimentary Hemming
templates.content: We do offer Complimentary Hemming! You can read all about it in detail here: https://tadashishoji.attn.tv/sl/0ZH13ZZQ I hope this helps.

templates.name: No promotions
templates.content: I don't have any codes available at the moment, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out! In the meantime, you can check out our sales collection here: https://tadashishoji.attn.tv/sl/1QRk9u6Q

templates.name: Customer Support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customercare@tadashishoji.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I place an order over the phone?
templates.content: Yes, please give us a call at 1-855-272-6552. Be sure to reference the style number and color of the item(s) you're interested in purchasing.

templates.name: Can I return an online or phone order in-store?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't allow for items to be returned to our stores at this time, though we do include a pre-printed return label to allow for an easier return process.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-855-272-6552 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free ground shipping on all orders within the US.

templates.name: How do you recommend I care for my dress?
templates.content: We recommend following the care instructions indicated on the care label inside the dress and taking your dress to a trusted and experienced cleaner!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: http://instagram.com/tadashishoji and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/tadashishoji

templates.name: Rewards program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.tadashishoji.com/stylepoints-welcome

templates.name: Are the colors of the dresses true to what I see in the pictures online?
templates.content: While we do our best to ensure the photos we upload are true to the actual color of the dresses, you may experience a slight variation in color due to your own device's monitor.

templates.name: Can I pick up my order in-store?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't allow for items to be picked up in our retail stores at this time, though we do offer different expedited shipping options to allow for a speedy delivery.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://www.tadashishoji.com/storelocator

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://www.tadashishoji.com/shop/sale

templates.name: Return Policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here - https://www.tadashishoji.com/returnpolicy

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! What size do you usually wear? You can also check out the following size guide for reference: https://www.tadashishoji.com/size-guide

templates.name: Ambassador / sponsorship inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at customercare@tadashishoji.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at sales@tadashishoji.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Are discounted styles eligible for return?
templates.content: Final Sale items may be returned for store credit or exchanged for another size in the same style and color depending on availability.

templates.name: What if I need more time for the virtual consultation?
templates.content: Each appointment is approximately 45 minutes long. If you feel you may need more time, please email us at customercare@gtadashishoji.com and we can confirm stylist availability.

templates.name: Can others join the virtual appointment with me?
templates.content: Yes, others are welcome to join your appointment. You will have the option to add guests when scheduling your session.

templates.name: Do you ship to PO Boxes?
templates.content: I'm afraid we don't offer shipping to P.O. Boxes at this time.

templates.name: What if I need to cancel or change my virtual appointment?
templates.content: You will see the option to cancel or reschedule your appointment in your confirmation email. If you experience any issues, please contact us at customercare@tadashishoji.com as soon as possible.

templates.name: What is Queen sizing?
templates.content: Queen sizing refers to our Plus Size collection, which includes sizes 14Q to 24Q and 1X to 3X.

templates.name: How much does the virtual appointment cost?
templates.content: Our virtual appointment service is complimentary and you will not be charged.

templates.name: What is the difference between a regular size and a Queen size?
templates.content: Queen sizing refers to our Plus Size collection, which includes sizes 14Q to 24Q and 1X to 3X. For styles in which we offer both Missy and Queen options (for example, 14 and 14Q), the Queen size is larger in the bust, waist, and hip while maintaining the same length. Please refer to our Size Guide here: https://www.tadashishoji.com/size-guide to see whether our Missy or Queen size would be the best fit based upon your measurements.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: U.S. returns made with our prepaid UPS return label are free of charge.

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.narvar.com/tadashishoji/returns?locale=en_US

templates.name: How long will it take to receive a refund?
templates.content: Please allow up to 10 business days after we receive your return for processing. Once your refund is issued a credit confirmation email will be sent to the email address your order was placed under. An additional processing time may apply for your bank to complete the refund.

templates.name: Can I request a fabric swatch?
templates.content: Yes, please contact our Customer Care Specialist at 1-855-272-6552, who can arrange to send swatches of your desired fabrics and colors if available.

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via UPS. Once shipped, it will take 3-6 business days for domestic and international orders. Please note that Special Orders ship approximately in 10 weeks.

templates.name: Can I order a dress in a custom color?
templates.content: Yes, you may be able to place a special order for an existing style in a different color. Please contact us at 1-855-272-6552 to see if it would be possible to place a special order in your desired color. Please note that special orders take 10 weeks to produce, cost an additional 40% of retail price, and are final sale.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.tadashishoji.com/size-guide

templates.name: Restock button - brand specific
templates.content: I'm afraid I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in! Just click the "Don't see your size?" option and fill out the necessary information.
